commands.review_summary:
The PR replaces mtime-based models-config ready-cache inputs with content hashes, adds a models.json drift hash, hardens file handling, updates cache state/tests, and regenerates plugin SDK API baseline hashes.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection of PR head: create an over-cap `models.json` or `auth-profiles.json`, warm the ready cache, then rewrite different content with the same byte length. `safeHashRegularFile` can return the same `oversize:<size>` value and preserve the cache hit; I did not run it because this review was read-only.
commands.review_followup: Human/contributor action is required because real behavior proof is missing and security-adjacent code review findings remain, so this should not enter the automated repair lane yet.
